zh.lifeSummary: Anne Watson於大約1480年出生在英國英格蘭爾。她於1502年之前與Sir Thomas Hanmer在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Watson于大约1480年出生在英国英格兰爾。她于1502年之前与Sir Thomas Hanmer在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Watson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: patronymic meaning ‘son of Wat’, a pet form of Walter that was particularly common in Scotland and northern England. See Watt .

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: Anne Watson was born about 1480, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Thomas Hanmer before 1502, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Watson est née environ 1480, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Hanmer avant 1502, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Watson wurde um 1480 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat vor 1502 in Wales, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Hanmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Watson è nata il circa 1480 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Hanmer prima del 1502, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Watsonは約1480年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた。1502年以前にイギリスウェールズでSir Thomas Hanmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Watson(은)는 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1502년 이전 영국 웨일스에서 Sir Thomas Hanmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anne Watson nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Hanmer antes 1502, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Watson родилась около 1480 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Hanmer перед 1502 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Anne Watson nació aproximadamente 1480, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Sir Thomas Hanmer antes de 1502, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas.
